# kemp_delete_header_rule (Resource)

System-level rule that strips request headers matching `pattern`. Attach to a virtual service via `kemp_virtual_service_rule`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "kemp_delete_header_rule" "strip_server" {
  name    = "strip-server-header"
  pattern = "^Server$"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) **Required.** Unique rule name. Forces replacement if changed.
- `pattern` (String) **Required.** Header-name pattern (regex) to delete.

### Optional

- `only_on_flag` (Number) Optional. Run only if rule-chain flag (1–9) is set.
- `only_on_no_flag` (Number) Optional. Run only if rule-chain flag (1–9) is NOT set.
